name: Innovacom Inc.
summary: This record represents the public shell of InnovaCom, Inc. InnovaCom, Inc. provided equipment, and services that utilized the Motion Picture Expert Group first, and second generation standard for video and audio compression known as MPEG-1, and MPEG-2. The company had developed two lines of products TransPEG, and DVDImpact. Its TransPEG system allowed delivery of digital audio, and video content over broadband communication networks for applications such as video broadcasting, distant learning, video calls, videoconferences, and other video networking solutions. Its DVDImpact was a DVD pre-mastering system using its latest MPEG-2 compression technology. The company marketed its system-based TransPEG, and DVDImpact line of products to the professional video industry. InnovaCom is based in Santa Clara, California.
